economic_mechanism: Observed TSLL short-front relative extrinsic-per-day richness may compensate a bullish call diagonal for front gamma, package friction, and path risk when the TSLA/TSLL driver regime is non-bearish.
forecast_type: term-structure carry with conditional mild bullish direction
candidate_or_family_scope: One-lot TSLL bullish call diagonals using observed listed contracts and executable bid/ask marks; TSLA is context only, not a second traded underlying.
falsifier: At the first completed frozen population, close the family if the candidate has fewer than 20 non-overlapping eligible paths or fewer than 8 one-to-one controls, if median net package return fails to exceed its matched control by at least 5 percentage points, or if fewer than 55% of controlled paths outperform their controls. No threshold may be changed after outcomes are visible.

candidate_geometry.computed_delta_source: Black-Scholes delta computed from same-snapshot observed underlying spot and listed-contract implied volatility; delta is model-derived selection metadata, not an observed quote

candidate_selection_tie_breaks: smallest absolute distance from candidate short delta
smallest absolute distance from candidate short DTE
smallest absolute distance from candidate short strike as percent of same-snapshot spot
control_geometry.outcome_independence: Controls are selected from entry-snapshot fields only. Future package returns, exits, and assignment outcomes are forbidden inputs.

path_and_exit_rules.entry_mark: candidate and control package debit from same-snapshot executable leg marks
path_and_exit_rules.exit_mark: first executable package mark satisfying a frozen exit; no interpolation or Black-Scholes substitute
exit_stack: short leg at or below 7 DTE

capital_rules.admission_formula: observed entry debit plus $50 operational reserve must be <= $300
capital_rules.max_loss_status: unproven under early assignment, gap, exercise, and liquidation mechanics; the $300 admission cap is not a structural max-loss proof
capital_rules.capital_fit_status: research admission only; no L1 capital seat, paper promotion, shadow, arm, broker, or live authority until structural worst-case loss is proved within sleeve

data_dependencies: future TSLL weekday RTH snapshots with observed underlying spot, bid/ask, implied volatility, contract identity, strike, and expiration
chronological TSLA earnings and TSLL ex-dividend joins available at each decision time
executable follow-up package marks sufficient to resolve frozen exits and assignment guards
assignment/exercise/liquidation scenario evidence sufficient to state structural one-lot max_loss_usd
evidence_wake_condition: Re-evaluate only after the archive reaches 12 distinct weekday RTH dates, 3 short-expiry cycles, 20 non-overlapping candidate paths, and 8 frozen one-to-one controls. Before those floors, append provenance-safe data and report path eligibility/admission/control support counters only.
epoch_success_definition: Advance the exact observed term-carry mechanism from F0 only after the frozen 12-date, 3-cycle, 20-path, 8-control population passes both control-relative gates with clean chronology and executable marks; otherwise close it without changing geometry or opening the final 40% reserve.
pure_append_streak_policy: A schema-v2 EVIDENCE_WAIT handoff with evidence_wait_reaffirmation=true is a pure data-collection reaffirmation and does not increment the strategy no-advance pivot/burst-stop streak.
authority_limit: F0 observed-path mechanism research only; no Black-Scholes substitution for the observed claim, registry insertion, paper force, shadow, arm, broker, or live action.
